name: enhancement-hooks-plan
question: What enhancements will the infrastructure need?
decision: Infrastructure feature - no domain enhancements. Key exports: ISqlExecutor interface, BunSqlExecutor class, PostgresBackend class, normalizeRow/denormalizeRow utils. MCP tools: registerDbConnect, registerDbMigrate, registerDbQuery. Integration: PostgresBackend registered in backendRegistry under 'postgres' key.
rationale: Infrastructure features export classes/interfaces/utilities rather than domain enhancements. Consumers create PostgresBackend with their executor instance and register it in their environment's backendRegistry.
